data.content: Migrated rollbackBeatState in src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts to use 'kno rollback <id>' instead of 'kno update <id> --status <state>'. Also applied quoteId to beatId in the note command for consistency. Added 3 unit tests in memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts verifying: rollback command format, note addition with reason, and no note when reason omitted. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, test, build). Commit b62626d3 pushed to main.
